validation_rules.requirement: All expense reimbursements must be supported by an original receipt or invoice
validation_rules.notes: No receipt, no reimbursement. Jenny keeps all originals in the club binder.

validation_rules.requirement: Duplicate reimbursement submissions for the same expense
validation_rules.notes: Only one submission per purchase. Contact Jenny if receipt was already submitted.

validation_rules.requirement: Personal items or purchases not approved for club use
validation_rules.notes: Only pre-approved club expenses covered. No personal items.

validation_rules.requirement: Receipts submitted more than 60 days after purchase
validation_rules.notes: Policy violation. Submit promptly. Jenny processes at each monthly meeting.

validation_rules.requirement: Faded, torn, or illegible receipts with unreadable totals
validation_rules.notes: Request a bank or card statement to confirm amount if receipt unreadable.

validation_rules.requirement: Expense exceeds approved budget line for that category
validation_rules.notes: Must be approved by Ruth Callahan (President) before reimbursement.
Simple refreshments only. Over $40 requires board discussion.

validation_rules.requirement: Purchase from vendor not in QuickBooks vendor list
validation_rules.notes: Jenny adds new vendors as needed. Check with Jenny before purchasing from unknown vendor.
Any single purchase over $150 must be approved by board vote or Ruth at minimum.
Keep your receipt. Small dollar amounts may be covered from petty cash if approved.

context: Expense reimbursement rules for Glastonbury Garden Club volunteer officers and committee members. Jenny Wilkins (Treasurer) administers all reimbursements. Contact jenny.wilkins@Finthesiss.ai or see Jenny at monthly meetings.
